mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_JP_ORDER( IFA_ORDER_NO ,IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO ,BUTEN_CODE ,ACCOUNT_NUMBER ,CUSTOMER_ID ,SPECIFIC_KBN ,BRAND_CD ,MARKET ,ORDER_STATUS ,TRADE_KBN ,QUANTITY ,LIMIT ,AZUKARI_KBN ,PAYMENT_LIMIT ,REPAYMENT_METHOD_TYPE ,REQUEST_TYPE ,ORDER_SYUBETSU ,ORDER_SYUBETSU_LIST ,KANYU_KBN ,JUTYU_KBN ,CHECK_INSIDER ,CHECK_SOR ,CHECK_COMP_WRN_ALERT ,SHIKIN_SEIKAKU_KBN ,USER_ID ,CANCEL_USER_ID ,TESUURYOU_KBN ,ALTER_FLG ,AUTO_ORDER_KIND ,RBE_ORDER_KIND ,SASINARI_KBN ,PRICE ,TRIGGER_ZONE ,TRIGGER_PRICE ,OCO_SASINARI_KBN ,OCO_SASHINE ,DONE_SASINARI_KBN ,DONE_SASHINE ,DONE_RBE_ORDER_KIND ,DONE_TRIGGER_ZONE ,DONE_TRIGGER_NEDAN ,DONE_OCO_SASINARI_KBN ,DONE_OCO_SASHINE ,DONE_LIMIT ,JO_ZEI_KBN ,ALTER_ORDER_NUM ,RBE_ORDER_STATUS ,ORDER_TYPE ,ORDER_NUM ,ACCEPT_DATE ,ACCEPT_TIME ,SHUBETU ,CODE ,MESSAGE ,ESTIMATE_PRICE ,AMOUNT ,COMMISSION ,CONSUMPTION_TAX ,CAPITAL_GAIN_TAX ,NET_AMOUNT ,COST ,TRADE_DATE ,SETTLEMENT_DATE ,ACCEPT_LIMIT ,DONE_ACCEPT_LIMIT ,COM_ID_R ,AC_POSITION ,AC_POSITION_AFTER ,AC_BALANCE ,AC_BALANCE_AFTER ,ORDERED_MARKET ,TRADE_DEFICIT_AMOUNT ,ISA_BUY_LIMIT ,JRNISA_TRANSFER_AMOUNT ,SOR_LINK_KBN ,UNCLOSED_QUANTITY ,UNCLOSED_QUANTITY_AFTER ,MARGIN_CAPABILITY ,MARGIN_CAPABILITY_AFTER ,ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE ,ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE_AFTER ,APP_INTEREST_RATES ,APP_LENDING_STOCK ,PREMIUM ,TPOINT ,TPOINT_AFTER ,DAILY_CREDIT_KBN ,PAYMENT_LIMIT_DATE ,DATE_KBN ,BROKER_CODE ,INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD ,CREATE_TIME ,CREATE_USER ,UPDATE_TIME ,UPDATE_USER ,CCS_SEND_DATE ) VALUES( TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_T_JP_ORDER.NEXTVAL, 10, '0') ,1 ,#{req.butenCode} ,#{req.accountNumber} ,#{req.kokyakuId} ,#{req.tokuteiKouzaKbn} ,#{req.brandCode} ,#{req.market} ,'0' ,#{req.tradeCd} ,#{req.quantity} ,#{req.yukoKigen} ,#{req.depositType} ,null ,null ,null ,#{req.orderKind} ,#{req.orderClassification} ,#{req.kanyuKbn} ,#{req.ordersHouhou} ,#{req.insiderCheck} ,#{req.sorCheck} ,#{req.complaCheckWarning} ,#{req.uaiQaFundCharacter} ,#{req.userId} ,null ,#{req.tesuuryouKbn} ,null ,#{req.automaticOrderClassification} ,#{req.rbeChumonShubetsu} ,#{req.sashinariKbn} ,#{req.sashine} ,#{req.triggerZone} ,#{req.triggerNedan} ,#{req.ocoSasinariKbn} ,#{req.ocoSashine} ,#{req.doneSasinariKbn} ,#{req.doneSashine} ,#{req.doneRbeOrderKind} ,#{req.doneTriggerZone} ,#{req.doneTriggerNedan} ,#{req.doneOcoSasinariKbn} ,#{req.doneOcoSashine} ,#{req.doneYuukouKigen} ,#{req.joutoekizeiKbn} ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,#{req.brokerCode} ,#{req.brokerChargeCode} ,IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE ,#{req.createUser} ,IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE ,#{req.updatedBy} ,null )
mapper.update: UPDATE T_JP_ORDER SET ACCEPT_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') , UPDATE_TIME = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , UPDATE_USER = #{req.updatedBy} WHERE IFA_ORDER_NO = #{req.ifaOrderNo} AND IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = '1'
